description: To attend you must register here [https://luma.com/98j1utv6](https://luma.com/98j1utv6) Agenda 5 - 5:45: Pizza / Beer 5:45 - 6:15: Future of Cassandra® based GenAI with IBM watsonx 6:15 - 7:00: ACID Transactions with Apache Cassandra - Aaron Ploetz 7:00 - 8:00: Major name customer scenario with Cassandra 8:00 - 9:00: Networking SWAG giveaways - special items for first 35 attendees
